final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing marketing poster for a gaming monitor product launch, optimized for vertical short-video cover use.

Style/medium: clean minimal poster design, Swiss-style typography, high-end tech aesthetic with restrained elegance
Composition: rule of thirds layout, large bold headline occupying upper third, product visual or abstract graphic in middle third, tagline in lower third, vertical 9:16 format
Subject: gaming monitor product poster with dominant headline text
Scene/backdrop: solid color or subtle gradient background, generous negative space, no clutter
Lighting/mood: flat even lighting, sophisticated and premium atmosphere
Color palette: dark base (deep black or charcoal) with one accent color (electric blue or neon cyan) for tech feel, white or light gray for text
Text (verbatim): "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz" (main headline), "全球首发全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩" (tagline)
Constraints: must be instantly readable as thumbnail at small sizes; headline must be largest element; vertical orientation optimized for mobile screens
Avoid: busy backgrounds; multiple competing focal points; decorative elements without function; gradient overload; generic stock photo aesthetic
